excluded_source_columns.Sl. No: Row counter; carries no clinical information.
Site-local identifier; used as patient_id, not as a variable.
excluded_source_columns.Unnamed: 44: Empty trailing column produced by the source CSV export.
excluded_source_columns.Vit D3 (ng/mL): No canonical variable registered; vitamin D is out of scope for v1.
excluded_source_columns.Avg. F size (L) (mm): Mean follicle size is not in the canonical registry yet.
excluded_source_columns.Avg. F size (R) (mm): Mean follicle size is not in the canonical registry yet.
excluded_source_columns.Endometrium (mm): Endometrial thickness has no canonical variable in v1.
excluded_source_columns.Fast food (Y/N): Dietary self-report is unvalidated and not modelled in v1.
excluded_source_columns.Reg.Exercise(Y/N): Exercise self-report is unvalidated and not modelled in v1.
excluded_source_columns.Blood Group: Not relevant to any allowed use of this dataset.
excluded_source_columns.Pregnant(Y/N): Current pregnancy status has no canonical variable and confounds hormones.
excluded_source_columns.No. of aborptions: Pregnancy-loss count differs from pregnancy count; not canonical.
excluded_source_columns.Marraige Status (Yrs): Socially confounded proxy; excluded to avoid encoding bias.
excluded_source_columns.II beta-HCG(mIU/mL): Pregnancy assay; not a canonical variable and confounds hormones.
excluded_source_columns.I beta-HCG(mIU/mL): Pregnancy assay; not a canonical variable and confounds hormones.
excluded_source_columns.TSH (mIU/L): Thyroid axis is out of scope for the v1 canonical registry.
excluded_source_columns.PRL(ng/mL): Prolactin has no canonical variable in v1.
excluded_source_columns.Hb(g/dl): Haemoglobin has no canonical variable in v1.
excluded_source_columns.RR (breaths/min): Respiratory rate has no canonical variable in v1.
